message:
feat(presenter): Implement state-tracked ANSI emission (bd-10i.4.3)

- Track current style, link, and cursor position to minimize output
- Use reset+apply strategy per ADR-002 for style changes
- Support synchronized output (DEC 2026) for flicker reduction
- Handle OSC 8 hyperlinks with link registry
- Emit grapheme content from pool for complex characters
- 11 unit tests covering all major functionality

Also updates LinkRegistry with full implementation:
- URL registration with deduplication
- Lookup by ID
- Remove and clear operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
